body:
dogteethbleed:

I want to go on a walk with someone and just never stop talking. The type of talking that has no strict topic, that hops around into hundreds of different things with no one thing lasting forever. A chaotic conversation that lasts until we run out of air, until we stop to take a break and genuinely run out of things to talk about.

Then we can just walk in comfortable silence, holding hands, leaning on eachother. Maybe saying a few things or listening to music, or just listening to the wind.
